creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #4)
> There's only patch-configure, patch-src-default.c isn't restored.
Right, sorry, I've misread the diff but realized my mistake just after I've sent my comment. :-(

> I think this is a bad default [...] and it doesn't match the defaults for
> the C compiler, linker, and other tools that are still hardcoded as cc,
> ld, and so on.
Makes perfect sense now, thank you Tijl.
